title: PBP Lightsabers
description: A simple mod that adds lightsabers to Minecraft in a vanilla-feeling way!
body:
A long long time ago in a galaxy far fary away, an amethyst asteriod crashed onto a little planet. The asteriod shattered into thousands of pieces which were buried deep underground. Using these new crystals, the ancient builders discovered a way to create a powerful weapon. For centuries the recipe was lost, but genius minds worked together to discover it once again. And now it's your turn. May the force be with you.

**How to make lightsabers**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Combine an amethyst shard with red, green, blue, white, or purple dye in a crafting table to get a colored amethyst shard.

Combine two colored amethyst shards with a netherite ingot in a smithing table to get a colored netherite ingot.

With the netherite ingot, right click a block of amethyst to transform it into a colored amethyst block.

Right click the colored amethyst block four more times to grow the kyber crystal.

Once the kyber crystal is fully grown, you can mine it with a diamond pickaxe (or any diamond-level or higher pickaxe) to get the kyber crystal.

Stack two iron ingots on top of each other in the crafting table to make lightsaber hilts.

Put the lightsaber hilt in the bottom left corner of the crafting table, the kyber crystal in the middle, and a colored amethyst shard (matching the color of the kyber crystal) in the top right corner. And you have just made your very own lightsaber!

</details>

**_**This mod is in really early development, as I am working on other projects at the same time, eventually I will expand on this, adding to the lore and customization of the lightsabers :)**_**
